{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Nagatonatoth
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Nagatonatoth]] was set to hunt by the [[Monarch]] and was killed by its prey.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|"You set Derianatoth and Nagatonatoth to hunt, and they too were killed by their prey."<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
